---
title: "Blog Posts"
---
 

## Tutorials
#### Collecting and Analyzing Scholarly Metadata from Scratch with the Crossref REST API [(for absolute beginners)]{.smallcaps}
* Part 1: [What's Crossref?](/blog/CR_API_Tutorials/introduction_to_tutorial.qmd) [March 31st 2026]{.smallcaps}
* Part 2: [Introduction to the JSON API response format](/blog/CR_API_Tutorials/JSON.qmd) [March 26th 2026]{.smallcaps}
* Part 3: [Troubleshooting JSON browser viewing issues](/blog/CR_API_Tutorials/troubleshooting-browser-JSON-view.qmd) [March 30th 2026]{.smallcaps}

## IGDORE ReproDucibilitea Summaries
* [Open code for open science?](/blog/IGDORE/openCodeForOpenScience.qmd) [March 5th 2025]{.smallcaps}
